title: Coinbase investing into stablecoin reserves ETF issued by ProShares

title: Minneapolis Fed president likens stablecoins to casino chips
snippet: Neel Kashkari, President of the Minneapolis Federal Reserve, likened stablecoins to casino chips during a Bank of Korea event. The comparison was actually a practical one.
